Table	Create Table
gartengluck_nutzer	CREATE TABLE `gartengluck_nutzer` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `telefon` varchar(30) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(200) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `strasse` varchar(200) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `ort` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `plz` varchar(10) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `push_token` varchar(500) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `gesperrt` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `sperr_grund` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */,
  UNIQUE KEY `telefon` (`telefon`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci AUTO_INCREMENT=150001
Table	Create Table
hofmarkt_bestellungen	CREATE TABLE `hofmarkt_bestellungen` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `hof_user_id` int NOT NULL,
  `kunde_name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `kunde_telefon` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `kunde_email` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `kunde_strasse` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `kunde_plz` varchar(10) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `kunde_ort` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `produkte` json NOT NULL,
  `gesamtpreis` decimal(10,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `nachricht` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `status` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'neu',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */,
  KEY `idx_hof_user_id` (`hof_user_id`),
  KEY `idx_status` (`status`),
  KEY `idx_kunde_telefon` (`kunde_telefon`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci
Table	Create Table
referral_codes	CREATE TABLE `referral_codes` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `user_id` int NOT NULL,
  `code` varchar(20) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */,
  UNIQUE KEY `referral_codes_user_id_unique` (`user_id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `referral_codes_code_unique` (`code`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci AUTO_INCREMENT=30001
Table	Create Table
referral_rewards	CREATE TABLE `referral_rewards` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `referrer_id` int NOT NULL,
  `referred_id` int NOT NULL,
  `eingeloest` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `eingeloest_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */,
  UNIQUE KEY `referral_rewards_referred_id_unique` (`referred_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

users	CREATE TABLE `users` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `openId` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `name` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `email` varchar(320) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `loginMethod` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `role` enum('user','admin') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'user',
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `lastSignedIn` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */,
  UNIQUE KEY `users_openId_unique` (`openId`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci
